candidates.notes: City-continent probe (F1=0.83) is close to 0.85 quality gate. Full mode with additional layers (6, 18, 24) expected to cross threshold. First-letter needs different probe approach. RAVEL ICL prompts work well for factual hierarchies.

NOT SUPPORTED: No meaningful CMI-absorption correlation at L0=22 even with perfect probes (rho=0.0439). Rate-distortion framing does not hold for this specific CMI formulation. Demote CMI theoretical claims to appendix.

refinements_needed: Test layers 6, 18, 24 in full mode (factual knowledge may be at later layers)
First-letter: increase vocabulary size or use LogisticRegression with word-position extraction
Consider relaxing quality gate to 0.80 for RAVEL hierarchies (harder than first-letter)
